item.name: Jade Mantis Shrimp
item.description:
A beautiful jade-colored crustacean that is the envy of many a sea creature.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Making its home in the Sea of Jade, this species of crustacean is well known for the breathtaking green of its carapace─a color with which it seems rather singularly taken in spite of its ability to perceive myriad hues. To maintain the desired coloration, individuals will migrate along spectral currents upon coming of age, in search of the perfect environment.
